german_requirement.title: Majority of Roles Do Not Require German Skills
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant gap exists, with most positions accessible without German proficiency.

pm_type.title: Customer-facing PMs Dominate Role Landscape
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between customer-facing and technical PM roles, highlighting a concentration in specialized positions.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate the Market
seniority.subtitle: With 63% of positions held by senior professionals, the market is clearly senior-heavy.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates with Limited Flexibility
work_mode.subtitle: A significant majority of roles require on-site presence, with minimal remote options available.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: All job opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with no remote or unclear options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Now Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: 32% of roles demand AI as a core responsibility or skill.

industry.title: PM demand spans multiple industries
industry.subtitle: Hiring is spread across industries with no single sector strongly dominant.
